questions.question: What is the primary benefit of adding Schema Markup to your website?

options.text: It makes your website's font look more professional.
It provides structured context to search engines and AI models, removing ambiguity about your content.
It automatically translates your site into multiple languages.
It prevents hackers from accessing your site.

questions.explanation: Schema markup provides machines with explicit data about your content (e.g., this is a 'Price', this is a 'Review', this is a 'Person'), which helps them trust and cite your information accurately.

questions.question: Why is JSON-LD the preferred method for implementing schema for non-developers?

options.text: Because it is written in binary code.
Because it is a standalone block of code that can be easily copied and pasted into the site's header without altering the visual HTML.
Because it makes images load faster.
Because it is the only format that works on iPhones.

questions.explanation: Unlike other schema methods (like Microdata), JSON-LD doesn't require you to wrap individual elements of your text in tags. You just add the code block to the header, making it much easier to manage.

questions.question: Which schema type is most effective for winning placement in Google's AI Overviews?

options.text: AudioObject Schema
Recipe Schema
FAQPage Schema
Sitemap Schema

questions.explanation: FAQPage schema explicitly maps common questions to direct answers. This structured Q&A format is exactly what AI Overviews look for when selecting sources for search queries.

questions.question: How should a solo founder use Person and Organization schema together?

options.text: They shouldn't use both; they should choose only one.
By using them to link the 'Expert' (Founder) to the 'Solution' (Company) in the AI's Knowledge Graph.
By copy-pasting their resume into both fields.
By using them to hide their identity from search engines.

questions.explanation: Linking Person and Organization schema creates 'Entity Authority.' It tells the AI that the reputable expert (you) stands behind the reputable solution (your company), building trust for both.

questions.question: What is the correct tool to use before publishing your schema markup?

options.text: Google Maps
Google Rich Results Test
Facebook Ads Manager
Grammarly

questions.explanation: The Google Rich Results Test allows you to paste your URL or code snippet to verify that it is valid JSON-LD and correctly recognized by Google's systems.

questions.question: Identify 3 questions your potential customers ask most frequently. If you were for formulate these as FAQPage schema, what is the 'One-Sentence Answer' for each that provides immediate value without sounding like a sales pitch?
promptHints: Think about what a 'helpful professor' would say.
